Definition: No lie; being completely honest and truthful
Example: That concert was the best I've ever been to, no cap.

Definition: To do something exceptionally well; to excel or dominate
Example: You absolutely slayed that presentation today!

Definition: Suspicious or untrustworthy; something that seems off
Example: He said he was busy but posted stories at the club — that's sus.

Definition: Extremely good, especially used for food but applies to anything amazing
Example: This mac and cheese is absolutely bussin.

Definition: For real for real; used to emphasize sincerity or agreement
Example: I'm so tired of this class, fr fr.

Definition: An affirmation meaning okay, sure, or sounds good
Example: You wanna grab food later? Bet.

Definition: Average, mediocre, or nothing special
Example: Everyone hyped that movie up but honestly it was mid.

Definition: Being bitter, upset, or resentful about something
Example: She's been salty ever since she lost the game.

Definition: Being overly upset, bothered, or stressed about something
Example: Why are you so pressed about what they said? Just let it go.

Definition: An extremely devoted and enthusiastic fan of someone or something
Example: I stan her music — I've been to every single tour.

Definition: Period but with extra emphasis; end of discussion, no debate
Example: She's the best player on the team, periodt.

Definition: An assessment of someone's mood, energy, or the atmosphere of a situation
Example: Walking into this party — vibe check: immaculate.

Definition: Used to describe the energy, mood, or impression something gives off
Example: That outfit? It's giving main character energy.

Definition: When something or someone occupies your thoughts constantly without effort
Example: That embarrassing moment from 2019 lives in my head rent free.

Definition: Executed something perfectly; knew exactly what to do and nailed it
Example: Her outfit at the gala? She understood the assignment.

Definition: Someone who acts like or is treated as the protagonist of their own story
Example: Walking through the airport with coffee and sunglasses — full main character moment.

Definition: A sudden feeling of disgust or turn-off toward someone you were attracted to
Example: He clapped when the plane landed and I got the ick instantly.

Definition: Someone who does way too much for a person they like, often without reciprocation
Example: He drove three hours just to bring her coffee — total simp behavior.

Definition: Suddenly cutting off all communication with someone without explanation
Example: We were texting every day and then he just started ghosting me.

Definition: Charm, charisma, or the ability to attract others through personality
Example: He walked up and got her number in two minutes — unspoken rizz.

Definition: Delusional; having unrealistic beliefs or expectations, sometimes used positively
Example: She thinks she'll date that celebrity — delulu is the solulu.

Definition: Did something extremely well; performed or executed flawlessly
Example: She ate that dance routine and left everyone speechless.

Definition: Did something so perfectly there was nothing left to criticize
Example: Her speech at graduation? She ate and left no crumbs.

Definition: Go outside and experience real life; stop being so terminally online
Example: You've been arguing on Twitter for six hours — please touch grass.

Definition: Spending so much time on the internet that it warps your perception of reality
Example: Only someone chronically online would know that reference.

Definition: Someone who seems to lack independent thought, like a non-player character in a game
Example: He just stands there agreeing with everyone — total NPC energy.

Definition: Slightly, secretly, or in a subtle understated way
Example: I lowkey love that song even though everyone says it's bad.

Definition: Openly, obviously, or without any attempt to hide it
Example: I highkey need a vacation right now.

Definition: Completely serious; not joking at all
Example: I'm deadass not going to that party tonight.

Definition: Feels uniquely better or more impactful than usual
Example: Music hits different when you're driving at night.

Definition: Something is so funny it's making you lose it
Example: That meme is absolutely sending me right now.

Definition: Used to indicate something is so funny you're figuratively dead from laughing
Example: She really said that with a straight face 💀

Definition: When a reply gets more likes than the original post, indicating public disagreement
Example: His bad take got ratioed so hard the replies are brutal.

Definition: A loss or failure; something negative or embarrassing
Example: Forgetting your lines during the presentation was a massive L.

Definition: A win or success; something positive and worth celebrating
Example: Getting that promotion is a huge W, congrats!

Definition: A euphemism used online to avoid content moderation filters on sensitive topics
Example: That horror movie scene where the villain tries to unalive everyone was wild.

Definition: Being the ultimate example or embodiment of something
Example: She's the CEO of arriving fashionably late to every event.

Definition: Someone who seeks validation by putting others down or acting different to gain approval
Example: She only said that to impress him — such pick me behavior.

Definition: To manipulate someone into questioning their own reality or perceptions
Example: Don't try to gaslight me — I know what I saw.

Definition: To control access to information, trends, or communities to keep them exclusive
Example: Stop gatekeeping that restaurant — tell us where it is!

Definition: A woman who is ambitious and assertive, sometimes used sarcastically
Example: She quit her job to start her own company — total girlboss move.

Definition: A phase or period in someone's life defined by a particular theme or behavior
Example: I'm entering my fitness era — gym every morning at 6 AM.

Definition: The effect of consuming too much low-quality internet content, degrading your humor and attention span
Example: I spent all weekend watching TikTok and now I have terminal brainrot.

Definition: A person's perceived social points or cool factor based on their actions
Example: Tripping in front of everyone — minus 1000 aura.

Definition: A trait that isn't a red flag or green flag but is oddly notable or boring
Example: His beige flag is that he narrates everything he's cooking.

Definition: Outdated, uncool, or trying too hard to be trendy in an older millennial way
Example: Live laugh love signs are so cheugy at this point.

Definition: Something you think about constantly and obsessively, referencing men's fixation on Rome
Example: The Roman Empire for me is wondering if fish get thirsty.

Definition: A threat to fight someone; an invitation to physical confrontation
Example: Talk about my friends again and you're gonna catch these hands.

Definition: Enjoying life to the fullest without caring about others' opinions
Example: Quit my toxic job, booked a solo trip — living my best life.

Definition: Something so awkward or embarrassing it makes you physically uncomfortable
Example: His public proposal after two weeks of dating was pure cringe.
